screenshotupload-dropzone-label: Heading shown inside the paste/drop zone added to Special:Upload.
screenshotupload-dropzone-hint: Explanatory text shown inside the paste/drop zone on Special:Upload.
screenshotupload-error-notimage: Error shown when the pasted or dropped data is not a recognised image.
screenshotupload-error-toolarge: Error shown when the screenshot exceeds the size limit. $1 is the limit in whole megabytes.
screenshotupload-form-uploading: Notification shown while the screenshot is being uploaded from Special:Upload via the API.
screenshotupload-form-uploaded: Notification shown after the screenshot upload succeeds.
screenshotupload-form-failed: Error notification when the upload fails. $1 is the error detail.
screenshotupload-form-warning: Notification when the upload returns warnings (e.g. the file already exists). $1 lists the warning keys.
screenshotupload-default-filename: Fallback prefix for an auto-generated screenshot filename.
screenshotupload-annotator-title: Title bar of the crop & annotate editor modal.
screenshotupload-action-confirm: Label for the button that accepts the edited screenshot.
screenshotupload-action-cancel: Label for the button that closes the editor without using the screenshot.
screenshotupload-editor-uploading: Notification shown while a pasted screenshot is being uploaded from the wikitext editor.
screenshotupload-editor-success: Notification shown after a screenshot is uploaded and its File link inserted.
screenshotupload-editor-failed: Error notification when uploading fails. $1 is the error detail.
screenshotupload-editor-exists: Notification shown when the chosen filename already exists and a new name is generated.
screenshotupload-editor-comment: Upload summary/comment recorded for screenshots uploaded via this extension.
screenshotupload-editor-form-hint: Notification shown in 'form' edit mode after the tag is inserted and the upload page has been opened.
screenshotupload-editor-openupload: Link label shown when the browser blocks the automatic opening of the upload page; clicking it opens the upload page manually.
